data.title: Bitcoin Core Passes First-Ever Public Security Audit With Flying Colors
data.description:
Bitcoin Core successfully completed its first independent security audit in the software's 16-year history, with Quarkslab identifying only minor issues and no critical vulnerabilities in the implementation that secures the network's trillion-dollar value.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-core-passes-first-ever-public-security-audit-with-flying-colors/

data.title: US Vice President Vance: The government shutdown will certainly cause some losses, but the losses will be small.
data.description: U.S. Vice President Vance stated that the government shutdown will certainly cause some losses, but he believes the losses will be small, and the U.S. economic boom will take some time to materialize, with job opportunities flowing to U.S.-born citizens. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve's Hamak: Non-farm payrolls report "slightly outdated" but in line with expectations
data.description: Federal Reserve official Hamak stated that the non-farm payroll report was "slightly outdated" but in line with expectations. The employment data appeared somewhat mixed, highlighting the challenges facing monetary policy and providing a fairly clear understanding of the current state of inflation. Anecdotal reports still indicate that hiring and layoff rates are low, suggesting a weakening of inflation-related demand. (Jinshi)

data.title: US Vice President Vance: Markets expected to "go crazy" over the non-farm payroll report.
data.description: US Vice President Vance stated that he expects markets to "go crazy" over the non-farm payroll report. A recent poll shows growing dissatisfaction among Americans with the Trump administration's economic policies, with overall economic sentiment deteriorating significantly. In the survey, 76% of respondents considered the US economy to be in "bad" shape, a further increase from 67% in July. Most respondents indicated that the cost of living, including healthcare and housing, continues to rise. Only 15% of respondents believed the Trump administration's economic policies had a positive effect, while 46% believed these policies worsened the economic situation. (Jinshi)

data.title: In the past four hours, $100 million in liquidations have occurred across the entire network, including $13.15 million in TNSR liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $100 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past 4 hours, including $58 million in long positions and $42.15 million in short positions. In addition, $13.15 million in TNSR positions were liquidated.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $100 Million Liquidation in Four Hours
data.description: According to Odaily, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed a total liquidation of $100 million over the past four hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $58 million, while short positions saw liquidations totaling $42.15 million. Additionally, TNSR experienced liquidations amounting to $13.15 million.

data.title: U.S. Vice President Vance Predicts Market Volatility Due to Employment Report
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Vice President Vance has indicated that the market is expected to experience significant volatility in response to the upcoming non-farm employment report. This statement highlights the potential impact of employment data on market dynamics.

data.title: MSTR Stock Recovers Amid $60B Arizona State Pension Fund Bet
data.description:
Key Insights The MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock, now Strategy, has recorded a surge of over 3% in the pre-market trading session today, following a decline of nearly 10% in the prior session. Notably, the recovery comes as the US Arizona State Pension (ASRS) Fund increased its position in Strategy stock to $15 million.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/20/mstr-stock-recovers-amid-60b-arizona-state-pension-fund-bet/

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Barr: Monetary policy needs to be carefully formulated to balance risks.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Barr expressed concern about inflation remaining at 3%. He stated that monetary policy needs to be carefully formulated to balance risks. Support for the labor market is necessary, but inflation needs to be restored to 2%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Over $38 million in margin calls were triggered across the entire network in the past hour, primarily affecting long positions.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $38.0677 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $29.4582 million in long positions and $8.6095 million in short positions.

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: GANA theft caused by leakage of Payment Stake contract owner's private key
data.description: SlowMist Cosine posted on the X platform that the GANA theft was caused by the leakage of the GANA Payment Stake contract owner's private key. The subsequent attack used some techniques, such as the 7702 delegate exploit, which could also bypass the onlyEOA judgment of unstake. By changing the relevant Rate and Fee, the attack result was that staking a few hundred USDT could unlock staking hundreds of thousands of USDT.

data.title: Gate announced that it will provide full refunds and random GT airdrops to all users who participated in the BOB Web3 Launchpad campaign.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will provide full refunds to all users who participated in the BOB Launchpad and distribute a random number of GT airdrops to all users who successfully participated in the first phase of the Gate Web3 Launchpad. Users who completed KYC verification through Gate will automatically receive the airdrop; users who completed KYC verification through the Web3 Launchpad homepage can submit their GT payment address or Gate UID via the official form before 00:00 (UTC+8) on November 27th. After users submit their information, Gate will complete the airdrop distribution within 3 business days.

data.title: Solana: Something big is about to happen.
data.description: Solana posted on the X platform: Something big is coming.

data.title: Thumzup, a company associated with Trump's eldest son, acquired Dogehash, a Dogecoin and Litecoin mining company.
data.description: Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of President Trump, announced the acquisition of Dogehash, a Dogecoin and Litecoin mining company, by Thumzup Media Corporation, a social media company with cryptocurrency reserves. Following the acquisition, Dogehash will become a wholly owned subsidiary and will undergo a rebranding. Thumzup also disclosed that it held assets worth $52 million as of the end of the third quarter. (PRNewswire)

data.title: MegaETH plans to launch a pre-deposit cross-chain bridge on November 25, with a limit of $250 million.
data.description: MegaETH announced on the X platform that it plans to launch a pre-deposit cross-chain bridge on November 25, allowing Ethereum USDC to be exchanged for Mega mainnet USDm across chains, with a limit of $250 million.

data.title: Ark Invest buys more crypto stocks worth $40M amid crypto market meltdown
data.description:
Ark Invest has added more positions in crypto stocks, including Circle Internet, Bullish crypto exchange, and BitMine, despite the ongoing bearish market sentiment in the crypto arena.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ark-invest-buys-more-crypto-stocks/

data.title: Crypto stocks opened higher across the board, with BitMine rising 3.32%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, the three major U.S. stock indexes opened higher. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 500 points, the S&P 500 rose 1.5%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 2.1%. The crypto sector saw broad gains, with Coinbase up 2.01%, BitMine up 3.32%, Circle up 1.31%, and Strategy up 2.97%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering U.S. stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Bitcoin attempts ‘fragile lift’ as Fed signals patience on rate cuts
data.description:
Bitcoin briefly revisted $93,000 after ETF inflows but analysts warn that onchain metrics signal uncertainty around price action.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/379698/bitcoin-attempts-fragile-lift-as-fed-signals-patience-on-rate-cuts?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: GMGN will support Monad ecosystem token trading functionality.
data.description: GMGN released a video on the X platform announcing that it will support token trading functionality within the Monad ecosystem.

data.title: Metaplanet plans another $95 million bitcoin purchase after MERCURY preferred shares raise
data.description:
Metaplanet plans to raise ¥21. 25 billion (about $135 million) through the new Class B preferred share issuance.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/379683/metaplanet-mercury-preferred-shares-bitcoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
